title: NIIT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: NIIT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
